result.stdout:
Usage: asb-transport endpoint [command] [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.

Commands:
  create        Creates required infrastructure for an endpoint that uses
                topic-per-event topology.
  subscribe     Subscribes an endpoint to an event using topic-per-event
                topology.
  unsubscribe   Unsubscribes an endpoint from an event using topic-per-event
                topology.

Run 'endpoint [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

commands.payload:

Commands:

                topic-per-event topology.
  subscribe     Subscribes an endpoint to an event using topic-per-event
                topology.
  unsubscribe   Unsubscribes an endpoint from an event using topic-per-event
                topology.

Run 'endpoint [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
Creates required infrastructure for an endpoint that uses topic-per-event topology.

Usage: asb-transport endpoint create [options] <name>

Arguments:
  name                      Name of the endpoint (required)

Options:
  -c|--connection-string    Overrides environment variable
                            'AzureServiceBus_ConnectionString'
  -n|--namespace            Sets the fully qualified namespace for connecting
                            with cached credentials, such as those from Azure
                            PowerShell or CLI
  -s|--size                 Queue size in GB (defaults to 5)
  -p|--partitioned          Enable partitioning
  -h|--hierarchy-namespace  Sets the hierarchy namespace for prefixing
                            destinations in the format
                            <hierarchy-namespace>/<topic-or-queue>
  -?|-h|--help              Show help information.

result.stdout:
Subscribes an endpoint to an event using topic-per-event topology.

Usage: asb-transport endpoint subscribe [options] <name> <topic>

Arguments:
  name                      Name of the endpoint (required)
  topic                     Topic name to subscribe (required)

Options:
  -c|--connection-string    Overrides environment variable
                            'AzureServiceBus_ConnectionString'
  -n|--namespace            Sets the fully qualified namespace for connecting
                            with cached credentials, such as those from Azure
                            PowerShell or CLI
  -s|--size                 Queue size in GB (defaults to 5)
  -p|--partitioned          Enable partitioning
  -h|--hierarchy-namespace  Sets the hierarchy namespace for prefixing
                            destinations in the format
                            <hierarchy-namespace>/<topic-or-queue>
  -b|--subscription         Subscription name (defaults to endpoint name)
  -?|-h|--help              Show help information.

result.stdout:
Usage: asb-transport migration endpoint [command] [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help          Show help information.

Commands:
  create                Creates required infrastructure for an endpoint that
                        uses migration topology.
  subscribe             Subscribes an endpoint to an event using single-topic
                        approach (forwarding topology).
  subscribe-migrated    Subscribes an endpoint to an event using topic-per-event
                        topology.
  unsubscribe           Unsubscribes an endpoint from an event using
                        single-topic approach (forwarding topology).
  unsubscribe-migrated  Unsubscribes an endpoint from an event using
                        topic-per-event topology.

Run 'endpoint [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

commands.payload:
Usage: asb-transport migration endpoint [command] [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help          Show help information.

Commands:
  create                Creates required infrastructure for an endpoint that
                        uses migration topology.
  subscribe             Subscribes an endpoint to an event using single-topic
                        approach (forwarding topology).
  subscribe-migrated    Subscribes an endpoint to an event using topic-per-event
                        topology.
  unsubscribe           Unsubscribes an endpoint from an event using
                        single-topic approach (forwarding topology).
  unsubscribe-migrated  Unsubscribes an endpoint from an event using
                        topic-per-event topology.

Run 'endpoint [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
Creates required infrastructure for an endpoint that uses migration topology.

Usage: asb-transport migration endpoint create [options] <name>

Arguments:
  name                         Name of the endpoint (required)

Options:
  -c|--connection-string       Overrides environment variable
                               'AzureServiceBus_ConnectionString'
  -n|--namespace               Sets the fully qualified namespace for connecting
                               with cached credentials, such as those from Azure
                               PowerShell or CLI
  -s|--size                    Queue size in GB (defaults to 5)
  -p|--partitioned             Enable partitioning
  -h|--hierarchy-namespace     Sets the hierarchy namespace for prefixing
                               destinations in the format
                               <hierarchy-namespace>/<topic-or-queue>
  -t|--topic                   Topic name (defaults to 'bundle-1')
  -tp|--topic-to-publish-to    The topic name to publish to
  -ts|--topic-to-subscribe-on  The topic name to subscribe on
  -b|--subscription            Subscription name (defaults to endpoint name)
  -?|-h|--help                 Show help information.

Usage: asb-transport migration endpoint create [options] <name>

Arguments:

  -n|--namespace               Sets the fully qualified namespace for connecting

  -s|--size                    Queue size in GB (defaults to 5)
  -p|--partitioned             Enable partitioning
  -h|--hierarchy-namespace     Sets the hierarchy namespace for prefixing

                               <hierarchy-namespace>/<topic-or-queue>
  -t|--topic                   Topic name (defaults to 'bundle-1')
  -tp|--topic-to-publish-to    The topic name to publish to
  -ts|--topic-to-subscribe-on  The topic name to subscribe on
  -b|--subscription            Subscription name (defaults to endpoint name)
  -?|-h|--help                 Show help information.

result.stdout:
Subscribes an endpoint to an event using single-topic approach (forwarding topology).

Usage: asb-transport migration endpoint subscribe [options] <name> <event-type>

Arguments:
  name                      Name of the endpoint (required)
  event-type                Full name of the event to subscribe to (e.g.
                            MyNamespace.MyMessage) (required)

Options:
  -c|--connection-string    Overrides environment variable
                            'AzureServiceBus_ConnectionString'
  -n|--namespace            Sets the fully qualified namespace for connecting
                            with cached credentials, such as those from Azure
                            PowerShell or CLI
  -h|--hierarchy-namespace  Sets the hierarchy namespace for prefixing
                            destinations in the format
                            <hierarchy-namespace>/<topic-or-queue>
  -t|--topic                Topic name to subscribe on (defaults to 'bundle-1')
                            Default value is: bundle-1.
  -b|--subscription         Subscription name (defaults to endpoint name)
  -r|--rule-name            Rule name (defaults to event type)
  -?|-h|--help              Show help information.

result.stdout:
Unsubscribes an endpoint from an event using single-topic approach (forwarding topology).

Usage: asb-transport migration endpoint unsubscribe [options] <name> <event-type>

Arguments:
  name                      Name of the endpoint (required)
  event-type                Full name of the event to unsubscribe from (e.g.
                            MyNamespace.MyMessage) (required)

Options:
  -c|--connection-string    Overrides environment variable
                            'AzureServiceBus_ConnectionString'
  -n|--namespace            Sets the fully qualified namespace for connecting
                            with cached credentials, such as those from Azure
                            PowerShell or CLI
  -h|--hierarchy-namespace  Sets the hierarchy namespace for prefixing
                            destinations in the format
                            <hierarchy-namespace>/<topic-or-queue>
  -t|--topic                Topic name to unsubscribe from (defaults to
                            'bundle-1')
                            Default value is: bundle-1.
  -b|--subscription         Subscription name (defaults to endpoint name)
  -r|--rule-name            Rule name (defaults to event type)
  -?|-h|--help              Show help information.

Usage: asb-transport queue [command] [options]

Options:
